title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits, breaking bad ones, and mastering small behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical story about a young shepherd named Santiago who travels in search of a worldly treasure and discovers his destiny.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship that teaches how to write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Explains how focused work can help you achieve success in a distracted world and improve productivity.

title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A novel about a library between life and death where each book offers a chance to live a different version of your life.

title: You Don’t Know JS
author: Kyle Simpson
description: A deep dive into JavaScript core mechanisms, helping developers truly understand how the language works.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Explores the history of humankind from the Stone Age to modern times, focusing on how Homo sapiens came to dominate the world.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert Kiyosaki
description: A personal finance book that contrasts two mindsets about money and investing, encouraging financial independence.

title: Think Like a Monk
author: Jay Shetty
description: Shares lessons from monastic life to help reduce stress, find purpose, and live a meaningful life.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt
description: A classic book that covers practical programming techniques and mindset to become a better developer.

title: It Ends With Us
author: Colleen Hoover
description: A deeply emotional novel that explores love, resilience, and difficult life choices.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A comprehensive textbook covering a broad range of algorithms in depth, widely used in computer science education.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A classic novel exploring wealth, love, and the American Dream in the Roaring Twenties.

title: The 5 AM Club
author: Robin Sharma
description: A self-help book that teaches how waking up early can transform productivity, health, and personal growth.

title: Zero to One
author: Peter Thiel
description: Focuses on innovation and building startups that create new things rather than copying existing ideas.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern introduction to programming using JavaScript, covering both fundamentals and advanced concepts.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: The first book in the Harry Potter series, introducing a young wizard and his journey at Hogwarts.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Explains how human behavior and emotions influence financial decisions more than technical knowledge.

title: Refactoring
author: Martin Fowler
description: A guide to improving the design of existing code without changing its behavior.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
description: A counterintuitive self-help book that challenges conventional positivity and encourages focusing on what truly matters.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A classic novel addressing serious issues like racial injustice and moral growth in the American South.

title: The Power of Now
author: Eckhart Tolle
description: A spiritual guide that teaches living in the present moment and letting go of past and future anxieties.

title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
author: Douglas Crockford
description: A deep dive into the core features of JavaScript, focusing on the language’s strengths.

title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
description: A guide for entrepreneurs on building startups efficiently using continuous innovation.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Explains complex concepts of cosmology like black holes and the Big Bang in simple terms.

title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
author: Stuart Russell
description: A comprehensive textbook covering the theory and practice of artificial intelligence.

title: Getting Things Done
author: David Allen
description: A productivity system that helps organize tasks and manage time effectively.
